mission: Build, create, connect — decentralized family mesh. This file is the machine-routable spine for p31ca.org; human narrative stays in root CLAUDE.md, P31 COGNITIVE PASSPORT — v5.md, and docs/. Version namespaces: P31 home docs/CANONICAL-NUMBERING.md; values: P31 home p31-constants.json. Source→sink alignment: P31 home p31-alignment.json (p31.alignment/1.0.0) and docs/P31-ALIGNMENT-SYSTEM.md (ephemeralization; verify: npm run verify:alignment).

phosphorus31.label: Public org / programs (phosphorus31.org)
phosphorus31.repoPath: separate tree — not governed by this file

andromedaCorporate.label: P31 Open Doc Suite + corporate one-pager (Andromeda repo, not a separate deploy)

homeVertical.label: P31 home — Soup, passport authoring, wcd33

canonicalDome.label: Sovereign Cockpit Dome (K₄ interactive)
canonicalDome.note: Primary CTA from hub home. Not the same product as observatory. Astro uses trailingSlash:'always'; bare /dome redirects to /dome/. Do not add _redirects that send /dome/ back to /dome.

observatory.label: OBSERVATORY — geodesic panel inspector
observatory.note: Hub registry appUrl must stay observatory.html.

k4market.label: K4 MARKET — tetrahedral price geometry (Three.js r160)
k4market.note: Main viz surface. Symbol search and Larmor ring live in tomography.html.

tomography.label: K4 TOMOGRAPHY — symbol-seeded depth view (Three.js r183)
tomography.note: Depth companion to k4market.html. Linked from k4market nav.

planetaryOnboard.label: Planetary Onboarding — welcome packages + five-phase Wye → Delta
planetaryOnboard.note: Phase 0: p31.welcomePackages/1.0.0 picker (kid, adult, parent, neuro, builder, default); ?welcome=kid skips to flow. Phases 1–5 unchanged. Meta persists welcomeKey + label. Passkey stub. Redirect mesh-start?dial=&welcome=.

welcomePackages.label: Welcome package definitions (onboard + mesh-start)
welcomePackages.note: Schema p31.welcomePackages/1.0.0. Drives copy, dial default, personalTetra dock overrides, mesh-start chips. Fetched by planetary-onboard.html and mesh-start.html.

superCentaurStarter.label: Super-Centaur starter pack — data, finance, structural sovereignty (human page)
superCentaurStarter.note: Tailwind CDN. Indexes CWP-P31-SC / MAP / ECO, mesh-bridge MESH table, onboarding links. Short /centaur and /super-centaur in _redirects. Pair with p31-super-centaur-pack.json.

superCentaurPack.label: Super-Centaur starter pack — machine manifest
superCentaurPack.note: Schema p31.superCentaurStarterPack/1.0.0. CWPs, mesh fleet URLs from CWP-30, MAP anchors, p31ca URLs, condensed checklist.

familySovereignPack.label: Family sovereign pack — printable household delivery
familySovereignPack.note: Lobby URLs, welcome-package entry points, edge anchors, troubleshooting. Canonical prose: P31 home docs/FAMILY-SOVEREIGN-PACK.md. Short /family-pack in _redirects. Pairs with p31-super-centaur-pack.json.

p31StyleCss.label: P31 canonical design tokens (CSS variables)
p31StyleCss.note: Generated from andromeda/04_SOFTWARE/design-tokens/p31-universal-canon.json via npm run apply:p31-style. Hub default dark; org/light via data-p31-appearance=org. Linked by static pages, about template, cognitive-passport mirror.

p31TailwindCdn.label: Tailwind CDN preset (window.P31_TAILWIND_EXTEND)
p31TailwindCdn.note: Generated with p31-style.css; static HTML loads after cdn.tailwindcss.com.

p31CanonDemo.label: Universal canon — interactive hub/org switch + token gallery
p31CanonDemo.note: Tailwind CDN. Short /canon. Showcases p31-universal-canon.json via p31-style.css.

liveFleetBundle.label: Live fleet bundle — sites + Worker URLs (machine)
liveFleetBundle.note: Schema p31.liveFleet/1.0.0. Mirror P31 home p31-live-fleet.json; verify-live-fleet-mesh vs p31-mesh-constants.json in prebuild.

liveFleetDemo.label: Live fleet map — interactive demo page

demoLabs.label: Demo labs — curated static demos index
demoLabs.note: Short /demos in _redirects. Links fleet map, canon, ops, delta, connect, onboard, centaur.

visionJourney.label: Core journey — onboard → auth → EDE home (static narrative + CTAs)
visionJourney.note: Canonical P31 hub path in one page: /onboard, /auth, /start with Wye→Delta and Mesh links. Short /journey in _redirects. No medical or legal advice.

meshStart.label: EDE Personal — private assistant + EDE entry (k4-personal)
meshStart.note: Loads /p31-welcome-packages.json from meta.welcomeKey or ?welcome=. Personalizes headline, tetra blurb, prompt chips; merges package docks into first-time PUT /tetra. Hub fusion ?hub=&hubs=. ?agent= staging. Short /start in _redirects.

kidsGrowth.label: Kids growth — S.J. & W.J. height/weight, milestones, export
kidsGrowth.note: Static hub app; localStorage; Chart.js. Short /growth in _redirects. Not medical advice.

kidsHome.label: Household kids home — one screen to growth, missions, EDE, mesh, kid onboard
kidsHome.note: p31.householdKidsHome/0.1.0. Short /kids. Large tiles; grown-up links below.

initialBuild.label: Initial Build — production entry for CWP-P31-IB-2026-01 (intake → subject_id → bake personal tetra)
initialBuild.note: Short /build in _redirects. Normative spec: integration-handoff/INITIAL-BUILD-SITE-STRICT-PLAN.md. Phased UI: shell today; full intake and PUT sequence per CWP WBS. Sister to CWP-P31-PAR (Personal Agent Room).

connect.label: The Mesh — K₄ cage + product graph (Three.js r160)
connect.note: Envision / Build / Connect navigator. Family cage + product satellites. Click nodes to open products.

cognitivePassportGenerator.label: Cognitive Passport — static generator
cognitivePassportGenerator.note: Schema p31.cognitivePassport/1.0.0. Short /passport in _redirects (AGENTS live URL). Mirror: npm run sync:passport from P31 home cognitive-passport/index.html. verify:passport.

delta.label: Wye→Delta — public narrative page explaining mesh resilience and onboarding
delta.note: No Three.js. Uses Tailwind CDN + small inline script: Wye↔Delta crossfade slider (same topology story as planetary-onboard ribbon). Links to onboard, connect, geodesic, mesh-start, family pack. Canonical /delta (Pages); /why in _redirects → delta.html.

accessibility.label: Accessibility statement — p31ca.org
accessibility.note: WCAG-oriented practices; barrier reporting. Canonical /accessibility (Pages); do not add /accessibility → accessibility.html in _redirects (308 loop).

contact.label: Contact & imprint — P31 Labs
contact.note: Entity, EIN, channels. Sync copy with p31-constants.json organization + contact. Canonical /contact (Pages).

openSource.label: Open source — GitHub org and licenses

privacy.label: Privacy — data practices for hub static tools and edge Workers

publicSurfaceManifest.label: Public surface manifest — generic deliverable index
publicSurfaceManifest.note: Schema p31.publicSurface/1.0.0. Trust/legal URLs + key JSON endpoints + .well-known/security.txt path.

p31DeltaHiring.label: P31 Delta — proof-based hiring (role packets, WCDs, p31.proofRecord)
p31DeltaHiring.note: Vite static SPA: build in 04_SOFTWARE/p31-delta-hiring, run sync:p31ca, deploy with p31ca. Short /hiring in _redirects.

auth.label: Authenticate — passkey verification page for returning mesh members
auth.note: No Three.js. Calls /api/passkey/auth-begin + auth-finish. Falls back gracefully when Worker zone route is not live. Canonical /auth (Pages).

passkeyApi.label: WebAuthn passkey API — register + auth (Worker)
passkeyApi.note: Not a static file. Production: zone route pattern p31ca.org/api/passkey/* → Worker p31-passkey (wrangler.toml env.production.routes). Endpoints: POST register-begin, register-finish, auth-begin, auth-finish. Hub static pages use same-origin relative paths (see mesh.passkeyApiBasePath in p31-constants.json). README: workers/passkey/README.md.

latticeOracle.label: Lattice Oracle — toy crystallomancy (CSPRNG, client-only)
latticeOracle.note: No network. Short URL /oracle via _redirects. Not medical, legal, or financial advice.

creatorEconomy.label: Creator Economy Contract — p31.creatorEconomy/1.0.0
creatorEconomy.note: CI-verified fee/split disclosure. Source: ground-truth/creator-economy.json. Verifier: scripts/verify-creator-economy.mjs. Runs in prebuild. Public endpoint: /creator-economy.json (CORS *). Version 1.0.0 constraints: platform fee = 0, creator share = 1.0, room access free.

geodesic.label: GEODESIC — 3D structure builder + K₄ live room
geodesic.note: Three.js r160. Static mode: 5-track progressive coach (BONDING-style tutor + tool unlocks, localStorage geodesic:progress:v1; skip=full unlock). ?room=<id> bypasses coach and enables K4 live: wss to GeodesicRoom DO (e.g. geodesic-room.trimtab-signal.workers.dev) for authoritative vertices (v0–v3) plus Phase-1 shared builder shapes (tet/oct/ico/cube) persisted in the DO, Maxwell rigidity summary on /state and in hello, 50-shape cap. Full spec: workspace docs/GEODESIC-CAMPAIGN.md when P31 home tree is present.

openDocSuite.label: P31 Open Doc Suite (git-native office pack + Forge bridge)
openDocSuite.note: Source tree: andromeda/docs/corporate. .docx via 04_SOFTWARE/p31-forge. Short path: /doc-suite (redirect).

devWorkbench.label: P31 Dev Workbench — ephemeral mesh reads + edge agent + orchestrator (read)
devWorkbench.note: Single static page; sessionStorage only; fetches p31-constants mesh URLs + p31-agent-hub + p31-orchestrator. No secrets. Short /dev in _redirects. AGENT_HUB_SECRET blocks browser chat; mesh GETs always work when CORS allows.

operatorShell.label: Operator shell — unified interactive frame (CWP-P31-UI-2026-01)
operatorShell.note: Phase A–C + v1.1.0 closure: hub / nav+banner → /ops/; glass summary; home npm run command-center actions. CWP v1.1.0. Trust: EDGE-SECURITY.md; POST shift on command-center only.

integrationsBridge.label: OSS smart home, wearables, and operator tool catalog (machine + doc links)
integrationsBridge.note: Data from p31-constants.json integrations; apply:constants → public/p31-integrations.json. No secrets; empty endpoint slots = disabled.
